resources.string: Prepends the ~4,000-token decode table to every encoding. Required for the LLM to understand the glyphs. Turn OFF only if you\'ve already sent the table once in this conversation.
Type or paste a prompt to encode…

NewMx works inside any app on your phone with three entry points:

 1) TEXT SELECTION MENU
 Select text in any app (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Messages, Notes…), then tap “NewMx Encode” in the floating toolbar. The selected text is replaced with the encoded version.

 2) SHARE SHEET
 Tap Share → choose “NewMx (encode & copy)”. The encoded text is copied to your clipboard. Paste anywhere.

 3) THIS APP
 Use the “Try it” box above for quick one-off encodings.

 TIP: keep "Include decode table" ON for the first prompt of a session, then turn it OFF for follow-up prompts in the same conversation.
Field is read-only · encoded text copied to clipboard
NewMx Path 1 — input-side prompt compression for LLMs. No network. No analytics. Codec runs on-device.
